# Training Report - Week 10/2026
**Athlete**: Demo Runner

## This Week Summary
- Total Activities: 1
- Total Distance: 11.8 km
- Total Duration: 1h 04m
- Average Pace: 5:26 min/km
- Average Heart Rate: 158 bpm
- Average Cadence: 156 spm

## Last 4 Weeks Comparison
| Week | Activities | Distance | Duration | Avg Pace |
|------|------------|----------|----------|----------|
| 10/2026 | 1 | 11.8 km | 1h 04m | 5:26 min/km |
| 9/2026 | 0 | 0.0 km | 0h 00m | N/A |
| 8/2026 | 0 | 0.0 km | 0h 00m | N/A |
| 7/2026 | 0 | 0.0 km | 0h 00m | N/A |

## Detailed Analysis
**Volume**: Low volume (< 30 km). Consider gradually increasing weekly mileage.

**Pace**: Moderate pace (5:26 min/km). Within aerobic range but trending toward upper zone boundary.

**Cadence**: Low cadence (156 spm). Target 170-180 spm to reduce ground contact time and injury risk.

## Heart Rate Zones Distribution
| Zone | Time | Percentage |
|------|------|------------|
| Z1 | 0h 03m | 4.2% |
| Z2 | 0h 12m | 17.8% |
| Z3 | 0h 25m | 37.0% |
| Z4 | 0h 19m | 28.2% |
| Z5 | 0h 05m | 7.4% |

**Zone Analysis**: Low Z2 time (17.8%). Consider more easy runs for aerobic base building. The high Z3/Z4 distribution indicates the effort was above target intensity.

## Goals
**Current Goal**: Improve aerobic base and Z2 consistency
